content.problemStatement:
You have a rectangle of length AAA units and breadth BBB units. You also have a square with side length of CCC units.

Check if both the rectangle and the square have the same area. Print Yes\text{Yes}Yes if they have the same area, and No\text{No}No otherwise.


Input Format

The first and only line of input contains 333 integers - AAA, BBB and CCC.


Output Format
Output on a new line Yes\text{Yes}Yes if they have the same area, and No\text{No}No otherwise.


It is allowed to print each character in either case, i.e. YES\text{YES}YES, yes\text{yes}yes, yES\text{yES}yES will all be accepted as a positive response.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Both the rectangle and the square have an area of 161616 units2^22.

Explanation:
The rectangle has an area of 151515  units2^22 but the square has 161616 units2^22.
